name: Foulborn Headhunter
explicitMods: +46 to Dexterity
+72 to maximum Life
When you Kill a Rare monster, you gain its Modifiers for 60 seconds
mutatedMods: Rare and Unique Enemies within 120 metres have Minimap Icons
flavourText: "A man's soul rules from a cavern of bone, learns and
judges through flesh-born windows. The heart is meat.
The head is where the Man is."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

name: Vortex Hold
implicitMods: 0.6% of Chaos Damage Leeched as Life
30% chance to Unnerve Enemies for 4 seconds on Hit
explicitMods: +14% chance to Suppress Spell Damage
+129 to maximum Life
+35% to Chaos Resistance
35% of Physical Damage Converted to Cold Damage
craftedMods: 25% of Physical Damage Converted to Lightning Damage

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that grants life regeneration to you and your allies.
explicitMods: You and nearby Allies Regenerate 10 Life per second
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that grants accuracy and critical strike chance to you and your allies.
explicitMods: You and nearby allies gain 20% increased Critical Strike Chance
You and nearby allies gain +93 to Accuracy Rating
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

properties.name: Spell, Movement, Duration, Cold, Travel, Blink, AoE

socketedItems.secDescrText: Teleport to a location, damaging enemies and leaving Chilled ground in an area at both ends of the teleport. Shares a cooldown with other Blink skills.
explicitMods: Deals 1144 to 1716 Cold Damage
Base duration is 3.00 seconds
+0.3 metres to radius

19% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate for each Normal or Magic Enemy in Area
99% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate for each Rare or Unique Enemy in Area
48% increased maximum travel distance
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.name: Ancient Iridescence
implicitMods: Corrupted Blood cannot be inflicted on you
explicitMods: Adds 6 to 12 Chaos Damage to Attacks
4 to 6 Added Physical Damage with Bow Attacks
11 to 18 Added Cold Damage with Bow Attacks
6% chance to gain Phasing for 4 seconds on Kill
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an Abyssal Socket on an Item or into an allocated Jewel Socket on the Passive Skill Tree. Right click to remove from the Socket.

typeLine: Alchemist's Diamond Flask of the Cheetah
explicitMods: 23% reduced Duration
25% increased effect
14% increased Movement Speed during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Demon Fetish
explicitMods: 4% chance to receive additional Jewellery when opening a Reward Chest in a Heist
4% chance to receive additional Talismans when opening a Reward Chest in a Heist
15% chance in Heists for Orbs of Alteration to drop as Chaos Orbs instead

name: Progenesis
explicitMods: 19% reduced Charges per use
25% increased Duration
When Hit during effect, 25% of Life loss from Damage taken occurs over 4 seconds instead
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: They were bred in a cosmic ocean of raw creation.
Feasting and drinking of the milk of the mother,
they fought to the death for every last drop.

name: The Golden Charlatan
enchantMods: Quality does not increase Physical Damage
Grants 1% increased Area of Effect per 4% Quality
explicitMods: +200 Intelligence Requirement
248% increased Physical Damage
16% increased Attack Speed
167% increased Critical Strike Chance
Critical Strikes with this Weapon do not deal extra Damage
Gain a random Shrine Buff for 30 seconds when you Kill a Rare or Unique Enemy
+1 to maximum Mana per 2 Intelligence
flavourText: "He speaks, he leads, he stands tall...
yet, what has he truly done, save
spill our blood in pursuit of power?"

socketedItems.secDescrText: Applies a buff which can take some of the damage from hits for you before being depleted. Shares a cooldown with other Guard skills.
explicitMods: Base duration is 1.50 seconds
10% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate
This Skill's Cooldown does not recover during its effect

70% of Damage from Hits is taken from the Buff before Life or Energy Shield
Buff can take 2209 Damage
Buff grants Immunity to Bleeding
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill with a duration.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 50% more Skill Effect Duration
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: "The science is... incomprehensible at best. Nearest I can tell, the Arcana exhibits
a blast of wrath once it has been fully charged, and when directed at the Elder
will force it to take on the form it held before it entered our dimension."

socketedItems.secDescrText: While this skill is active, supported spells will be repeatedly triggered.

explicitMods: Supported Spells are Triggered when their Cooldowns are over

socketedItems.secDescrText: Conjures an icy barrier that chills enemies when they hit you. You drop chilled ground while moving, and take less Fire and Physical damage while stationary.

20% increased Skill Effect Duration

Buff grants 21% less Fire Damage taken from Hits while stationary
Chill Enemy for 0.5 seconds when Hit, reducing their Action Speed by 30%
Buff grants Immunity to Freeze
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Buffs you, and affects nearby enemies with an aura, differently depending on your stance. Both stances are more impactful against enemies closer to you. Using the skill again alternates between Blood Stance and Sand Stance.

53% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate
While in Blood Stance, Aura makes Enemies take up to 20% more Physical Damage from Hits
While in Sand Stance, Buff makes you take up to 20% less Damage from Enemies in Aura

name: Widowhail
explicitMods: 223% increased bonuses gained from Equipped Quiver
flavourText: "I loosed a volley of arrows into the heart of the man
who slew my beloved. There was no satisfaction, no
healing, no revenge. There was only... emptiness."
- Chieftainess Ahuana of the Ramako Tribe

a better world... but building requires sacrifice, and the useless
would be crushed into the foundation of her new utopia.

both fleeting and eternal, our eyes are opened to our potential."

You learn what it needs. You provide. You wait. Only
then, when it is ripe, does it yield its fruits."

a mote of flame, kindled by fury
and all in his path were obliterated.

flavourText: The farmer was struck again and again, but he refused to stay down.
Astonished, the raiding warlord ordered the man's family spared.

The consumer of our flesh. The seeder of our
souls unto the earth. We give the Gull his life.
The Gull gives us our Way."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants a buff providing fire damage based on your physical damage. Base Burning Damage is 30% of Overkill Damage
40% more Burning Damage
Buff grants 21% of your Physical Damage as Extra Fire Damage
